response.justification: Strong systems engineer with 18+ years of experience and current involvement in AI infrastructure work, but significant gaps in the core requirement of demonstrated AI expertise and AI-powered products. The pivot to AI work is very recent (April 2025), lacks a portfolio of recognized AI systems or strategic initiatives, and no advanced degree in AI. While the candidate has strong engineering fundamentals and entrepreneurial experience, the specialized AI strategy focus of the role is not adequately represented in their background.
strengths: 18+ years of software engineering experience exceeding minimum, with consistent senior/staff level positions across full-stack, cloud, and infrastructure domains
Founder of GISCollective (2016–present) demonstrates sustained entrepreneurial capability and ability to build, scale, and maintain production systems
Currently engaged in AI infrastructure work (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, showing active engagement with AI systems
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML, and no visible machine learning, AI products, or AI research experience prior to April 2025
Missing demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms—role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
AI involvement is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic; insufficient track record for Principal-level AI strategy and differentiation role
